title: UpdateDatabaseRequest
description: UpdateDatabaseRequest schema from Amazon Glue API

allOf.description: The ID of the Data Catalog in which the metadata database resides. If none is provided, the Amazon Web Services account ID is used by default.
The name of the database to update in the catalog. For Hive compatibility, this is folded to lowercase.
A DatabaseInput object specifying the new definition of the metadata database in the catalog.
